content.text:
Excellent! All tests pass. Now let me create a summary of the changes made:

## Summary

Successfully fixed hardcoded Tailwind colors in all 5 requested component files by replacing them with semantic tokens defined in `tailwind.config.js`. All changes maintain the same visual appearance while improving consistency and theme support.

### Files Modified

**1. D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase\src\components\ProjectContextDropdown.tsx**
- Replaced `dark:hover:bg-neutral-800` → `dark:hover:bg-surface-dark-elevated` (3 instances)
- Replaced `border-black/20 dark:border-white/20` → `border-border-light dark:border-border-dark`

**2. D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase\src\components\ProjectTree.tsx**
- Replaced `dark:hover:bg-neutral-800` → `dark:hover:bg-surface-dark-elevated` (2 instances)
- Replaced `hover:bg-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700` → `hover:bg-surface-light-elevated dark:hover:bg-surface-dark-elevated`

**3. D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase\src\components\ProjectPicker.tsx**
- Replaced `text-red-500` → `text-accent-red` (required field asterisk)
- Replaced `dark:bg-neutral-700` → `dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated` (project chip background)
- Replaced `hover:bg-neutral-300 dark:hover:bg-neutral-600` → `hover:bg-surface-light dark:hover:bg-surface-dark` (remove button)

**4. D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase\src\components\ProjectManager.tsx**
- Replaced `bg-status-error/10 border border-status-error/20 rounded-buttontext-status-error` → `bg-accent-red/10 border border-accent-red/20 rounded-button text-accent-red` (error message)
- Replaced `dark:hover:bg-neutral-800` → `dark:hover:bg-surface-dark` (cancel button)
- Replaced `hover:text-status-success` → `hover:text-accent-green` (unarchive button)
- Replaced `hover:text-status-error` → `hover:text-accent-red` (delete button, 2 instances)
- Replaced `dark:hover:bg-surface-dark-elevated` → proper semantic tokens for hover states

**5. D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase\src\components\SupportModal.tsx**
- Replaced `bg-neutral-100 dark:bg-neutral-800` → `bg-surface-light-elevated dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated` (kbd elements, 2 instances)
- Replaced `border-neutral-300 dark:border-neutral-600` → `border-border-light dark:border-border-dark` (kbd borders, 2 instances)

### Color Mapping Applied

- **Gray/Neutral colors** → `surface-*` tokens (surface-light, surface-dark, surface-light-elevated, surface-dark-elevated)
- **Red colors** → `accent-red` (errors, danger actions)
- **Green/Success colors** → `accent-green` (success actions)
- **Border opacity colors** → `border-light` / `border-dark` semantic tokens

### Verification

- ✅ TypeScript type-check: Passed
- ✅ Unit tests: All 221 tests passed
- ✅ No hardcoded color patterns remaining in modified files
- ✅ Semantic token usage now consistent across all project components

All components now use semantic tokens exclusively, ensuring proper theming support and consistency with the design system.
